title: OverusedHoe 1.21.8
description: PvP 1.21.8 UHC | Sword | SMP | NethPot | UHC
body:
**Why?**

I play alot of pvp on highly populated servers causing me to lag and have low fps and perform bad.

So I made this modpack to help you and me get a easy setup for perfect performance and quality.

**About**

This modpack has alot of pvp mods and is preferred for pvp use and not just survival or not pvp based gamemodes instead its main focus is gamemodes such as nethpot, sword, uhc, diamond pot, axe, mace, crystal, smp.

__MOD PACK VERSION: 1.21.8__
